creator: fbsd@opal.com
text: Because the various theme "Xfce Evolution Xyz" css files now reference a single copy of the assets in the common "Xfce Evolution" directory.  Previously, they each had their own copy of the assets.  It stopped working because I had changed the FreeBSD installation path to have those "-" characters (which I did thinking the spaces would cause problems when, in fact, they don't really).
